name: block-bar
title: Block Bar
description: Unicode block-character bar for displaying proportional values. Supports single-value and multi-segment stacked bars.

content.text: BlockBar.Segment must be used within BlockBar
BlockBar.Segment must be used within BlockBar

docs.description: Unicode block-character bar for displaying proportional values. Supports single-value and multi-segment stacked bars.

anatomy.name: BlockBar
anatomy.note: Root meter element with ARIA attributes

anatomy.name: BlockBar.Segment
anatomy.note: Customizable colored segment with optional children content

notes.title: Simple Mode
notes.content: Single-value bar: <BlockBar label="Errors" value={3} max={45} variant="error" />. Label, bar, and value display are rendered automatically.

notes.title: Multi-Segment Mode
notes.content: Pass a segments array: segments={[{ value: 60, variant: 'success' }, { value: 25, variant: 'warning' }]}. Value is derived from the segment sum unless explicitly provided.

notes.title: Compound Mode
notes.content: Pass BlockBar.Segment children for custom per-segment content (labels, event handlers, tooltips). Root renders the empty background automatically.

notes.title: Color Variants
notes.content: The variant prop accepts: default, muted, error, warning, success, info.

notes.title: Custom Characters
notes.content: filledChar (default: █) and emptyChar (default: ░) control the block characters. Individual segments can override with the char prop.
